title: Scenario 1 · Ambiguous request
subtitle: Tailor explanation depth to role, expertise, and task intent.
goal: Test A02 Role-Aware Response Detail and A03 Adaptive Interaction Control.

placeholderCards.label: A02 · Role-aware response detail
placeholderCards.description: Implemented as role framing for new hires, managers, and specialists.

placeholderCards.label: A03 · Adaptive interaction control
placeholderCards.description: Implemented as a compact in-chat slider for per-response detail selection.

placeholderCards.label: Next-step placeholder
placeholderCards.description: Reserved for later next-step prompts and task continuation logic.

title: Scenario 2 · Sensitive request
subtitle: Reveal framing and governance cues before risky actions proceed.
goal: Test A06 Preflight Task Framing and A09 Governance Banner with embedded uncertainty / recency cues.

placeholderCards.label: A06 · Preflight task framing
placeholderCards.description: Implemented as a short framing card with an expandable intent canvas using dropdown selections.

placeholderCards.label: A09 · Governance banner
placeholderCards.description: Implemented with passive and actionable banner variants that reflect sensitive-context risk.

placeholderCards.label: Embedded A07 / A14
placeholderCards.description: Scenario 2 responses preview uncertainty and freshness cues through framing and banner language.

title: Scenario 3 · Evidence-heavy request
subtitle: Inspect whether participants notice and trust evidence visibility patterns.
goal: Test A08 Evidence Register with embedded uncertainty / recency cues.

placeholderCards.label: A08 · Evidence register
placeholderCards.description: Implemented with an inline evidence panel and a side-panel / pop-up ledger variant.

placeholderCards.label: Embedded A07
placeholderCards.description: Confidence / uncertainty is embedded inside the evidence register rather than shown as a separate adaptation.

placeholderCards.label: Embedded A14
placeholderCards.description: Freshness / recency metadata is embedded inside the evidence register rather than shown separately.

title: Scenario 4 · Output generation
subtitle: Generate a practical artefact instead of a chat-only answer.
goal: Test A05 Work Artefact Composer through one presentation flow and one document flow.

placeholderCards.label: A05 · Work artefact composer
placeholderCards.description: Implemented as embedded editors for a presentation artefact and a document artefact.

placeholderCards.label: Presentation editor
placeholderCards.description: Supports slide-level dropdown editing, up to 15 slides, and PPTX export.

placeholderCards.label: Document editor
placeholderCards.description: Supports A4-style page editing with block reordering, images, and DOCX export.
